data.description:
## Context
Project-opt-in enforcement of authenticated authorship, enforced at the merge gate (local write-gate is UX-only), with replay never rejecting and snapshots carrying folded identities/signatures.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] With `identity.require_authenticated` on, the merge-gate verification flags an unsigned/unknown-author event; the local write-gate fails fast but is documented as UX-only.
- [ ] Replay never rejects: a bad-signature event still folds into state (test); `show`/`fsck` surface verified/unverified/unsigned.
- [ ] Snapshots carry folded-event identities+signatures so compacted signed events still verify (round-trip test).
data.title: identity: opt-in enforcement (write-gate + merge-gate verify) + replay-never-rejects + snapshot
